title: FDIC Coverage Overstated — Depositor Aggregation Skipped
description: Daily Insurance batch for 2026-03-16 computed per-account coverage without performing depositor-level aggregation. 1,951 of 6,006 accounts with balances exceeding the SMDIA ($250,000) were reported without aggregating across depositors. Total AUM processed: $1,320,961,508.99. Coverage gap affects Joint_JTWROS, IRAs, and Business ORC holders.
defect_description: Step 3 AGGRSTEP is commented out in JCL — depositor-level aggregation is entirely disabled
